_meta.verificationNote: Control names and descriptions are indicative paraphrases. Not verbatim AICPA text. Organizations must refer to the official TSC for authoritative criteria.

domains.name: Security (Common Criteria)
domains.description: Mandatory protection against unauthorized access and disclosure.

security.name: Demonstrates commitment to integrity and ethical values
security.description: The entity demonstrates a commitment to integrity and ethical values through tone at the top, codes of conduct, and accountability mechanisms.

security.name: Board exercises oversight responsibility
security.description: The board of directors demonstrates independence from management and exercises oversight of the development and performance of internal control.

security.name: Management establishes structure and authority
security.description: Management establishes structures, reporting lines, and appropriate authorities and responsibilities in pursuit of objectives.

security.name: Demonstrates commitment to competence
security.description: The entity demonstrates a commitment to attract, develop, and retain competent individuals in alignment with objectives.

security.name: Enforces accountability
security.description: The entity holds individuals accountable for their internal control responsibilities in pursuit of objectives.

security.name: Obtains and uses relevant quality information
security.description: The entity obtains or generates and uses relevant, quality information to support the functioning of internal control.

security.name: Communicates internally
security.description: The entity internally communicates information necessary to support the functioning of internal control.

security.name: Communicates externally
security.description: The entity communicates with external parties regarding matters affecting the functioning of internal control.

security.name: Specifies suitable objectives
security.description: The entity specifies objectives with sufficient clarity to enable identification and assessment of risks relating to objectives.

security.name: Identifies and analyses risks
security.description: The entity identifies risks to the achievement of its objectives and analyses risks as a basis for determining how they should be managed.

security.name: Considers potential for fraud
security.description: The entity considers the potential for fraud in assessing risks to the achievement of objectives.

security.name: Identifies and assesses changes
security.description: The entity identifies and assesses changes that could significantly impact the system of internal control.

security.name: Selects and develops monitoring activities
security.description: The entity selects, develops, and performs ongoing and/or separate evaluations to ascertain whether components of internal control are present and functioning.

security.name: Evaluates and communicates deficiencies
security.description: The entity evaluates and communicates internal control deficiencies in a timely manner to responsible parties.

security.name: Selects and develops control activities
security.description: The entity selects and develops control activities that contribute to the mitigation of risks to the achievement of objectives.

security.name: Deploys technology general controls
security.description: The entity selects and develops general control activities over technology to support the achievement of objectives.

security.name: Deploys through policies and procedures
security.description: The entity deploys control activities through policies that establish expectations and procedures that put policies into action.

security.name: Implements logical access security
security.description: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures over protected information assets.

security.name: Controls user registration and provisioning
security.description: Prior to issuing system credentials, the entity registers and authorizes new internal and external users.

security.name: Authorizes access based on roles
security.description: The entity authorizes, modifies, or removes access to data, software, functions, and other protected information assets based on roles and responsibilities.

security.name: Restricts physical access
security.description: The entity restricts physical access to facilities and protected information assets to authorized personnel.

security.name: Disposes of protected assets securely
security.description: The entity discontinues logical and physical protections over physical assets only after the ability to read or recover data has been diminished.

security.name: Manages threats from external sources
security.description: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect and correct threats identified from outside the system boundaries.

security.name: Restricts data transmission
security.description: The entity restricts the transmission, movement, and removal of information to authorized internal and external users and processes.

security.name: Controls deployment of unauthorized software
security.description: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect and act upon the introduction of unauthorized or malicious software.

security.name: Detects configuration changes
security.description: The entity uses detection and monitoring procedures to identify changes to configurations that result in the introduction of new vulnerabilities.

security.name: Monitors system components for anomalies
security.description: The entity monitors system components and the operation of those components for anomalies indicative of malicious acts or natural disasters.

security.name: Evaluates security events
security.description: The entity evaluates identified events to determine whether they could be or are the result of security incidents.

security.name: Responds to identified security incidents
security.description: The entity responds to identified security incidents by executing a defined incident response program to understand, contain, remediate, and communicate security incidents.

security.name: Recovers from identified security incidents
security.description: The entity identifies, develops, and implements activities to recover from identified security incidents.

security.name: Authorizes, designs, and tests changes
security.description: The entity authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures.

security.name: Identifies and assesses risk mitigation
security.description: The entity identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities for risks arising from potential business disruptions.

security.name: Assesses and manages vendor risk
security.description: The entity assesses and manages risks associated with vendors and business partners.

availability.name: Maintains current processing capacity
availability.description: The entity maintains, monitors, and evaluates current processing capacity and use of system components to manage capacity demand.

availability.name: Provides for recovery of infrastructure
availability.description: The entity authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, implements, operates, approves, maintains, and monitors environmental protections and recovery infrastructure.

availability.name: Tests recovery plan procedures
availability.description: The entity tests recovery plan procedures supporting system recovery to meet its objectives.

processing-integrity.name: Obtains processing integrity commitments
processing-integrity.description: The entity obtains or generates, uses, and communicates information regarding the objectives related to processing integrity.

processing-integrity.name: Implements processing integrity policies
processing-integrity.description: The entity implements policies and procedures over system inputs, processing, and outputs to support the achievement of processing integrity.

processing-integrity.name: Defines and implements error handling
processing-integrity.description: The entity implements policies and procedures to identify, report, and correct processing errors in a timely manner.

confidentiality.name: Identifies and maintains confidential information
confidentiality.description: The entity identifies and maintains confidential information to meet its objectives related to confidentiality.

confidentiality.name: Disposes of confidential information
confidentiality.description: The entity disposes of confidential information to meet its objectives related to confidentiality.

privacy.name: Notice
privacy.description: The entity provides notice about its privacy practices to data subjects.

privacy.name: Choice and consent
privacy.description: The entity communicates choices available regarding the collection, use, retention, disclosure, and disposal of personal information and obtains consent.

privacy.name: Collection
privacy.description: The entity collects personal information only for the purposes identified in the notice.

privacy.name: Use, retention, and disposal
privacy.description: The entity limits the use, retention, and disposal of personal information to the purposes identified in the notice.

privacy.name: Access
privacy.description: The entity provides data subjects with access to their personal information for review and correction.

privacy.name: Disclosure and sharing
privacy.description: The entity discloses personal information to third parties only for the purposes identified in the notice and with the implicit or explicit consent of the data subject.

privacy.name: Quality
privacy.description: The entity collects and maintains accurate, up-to-date, complete, and relevant personal information for the purposes identified in the notice.

privacy.name: Monitoring and enforcement
privacy.description: The entity monitors compliance with its privacy policies and procedures and has procedures to address privacy-related complaints and disputes.
